info.title: cccAD Sketch Collaboration API

tags.name: Sketches
tags.description: Sketch document lifecycle and current state

tags.name: Operations
tags.description: Persistent sketch operations and operation log

tags.name: Locks
tags.description: Soft edit locks for collaborative editing

get.summary: List workspaces available to the current user
get.description: Returns non-deleted workspaces created by the authenticated user or containing a sketch the user can access.

patch.description: Only the workspace creator can update workspace metadata.

delete.description: Soft deletes a workspace. Only the workspace creator can delete it.

post.summary: Create a new sketch document in a workspace
Create a new 3D part in a workspace

get.summary: List sketches available to the current user
get.description: Returns non-deleted sketches for which the authenticated user has at least reader access.

get.summary: Get the current materialized sketch state

delete.summary: Delete or archive a sketch document

get.summary: List persistent operations after a given sketch version

parameters.name: afterVersion
parameters.description: Return operations with version greater than this value.

post.description:
Applies a user CAD operation to the authoritative sketch state.
The backend validates references, checks permissions and locks, invokes the solver when needed,
persists the operation, increments the sketch version and broadcasts an `op.committed` event.

200.description: Operation accepted, rejected, or returned from idempotency cache

post.summary: Preview a solver intent without committing it to the operation log
post.description: Intended for throttled drag previews and UI diagnostics. This endpoint must not mutate the sketch.

post.summary: Analyze constraint components, DOF and diagnostics
Refresh a soft edit lock TTL

get.description:
WebSocket upgrade endpoint.

Client and server exchange JSON messages described by `RealtimeClientMessage`
and `RealtimeServerMessage` schemas.

get.summary: List explicit user permissions for a sketch
get.description: Returns explicit access grants for the sketch. The creator is represented as an admin grant with source `creator`.

put.summary: Grant or update a user permission for a sketch

delete.summary: Revoke a user permission for a sketch
delete.description: Admin users may revoke reader/editor permissions. Only the sketch creator may revoke admin permissions. The creator's own admin permission cannot be revoked.

get.summary: List ordered 3D features of a part.
List BREP/GLB/mesh/STEP/STL representations for a part.
Get current topology summary for picking/selecting faces and edges.
Get sketch plane derived from selected planar face.

bearerAuth.description: Keycloak access token. Client ID is expected to be `cad`.

createdByUserId.description: User ID of the sketch creator. Only this user can grant or revoke the admin role.
User ID of the sketch creator. Only this user can grant or revoke the admin role.

SketchPlane.description: Sketch plane in model coordinates. normal and xAxis must be non-zero vectors.

profiles.description: Solver-detected closed sketch profiles available to frontend tools such as extrusion selection.

createdByUserId.description: User ID of the sketch creator. Only this user can grant or revoke the admin role.

clientOpId.description: Idempotency key unique per sketch and actor.

lockId.description: Optional lock token acquired before editing.

SketchConstraintInput.description: Same as SketchConstraint, but the backend generates the final ID and active status.

grantedByUserId.description: Null for the implicit creator admin grant.
